name: Mexican Spinach
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine in a saucepan.
2. Add spinach and salt to the saucepan.
3. Cover the saucepan.
4. Place on high heat until steaming.
5. Reduce heat to lower setting and cook until just tender.
6. Drain excess liquid from the spinach mixture.
7. Stir in light cream, horseradish, and pepper.
8. Heat the mixture until well combined.
9. Garnish with sliced hard-cooked egg.
Serves 6.
